name: Pixelated Canvas
summary: An interactive pixelated image renderer with mouse-driven distortion effects and configurable dot patterns.
detailedDescription: Pixelated Canvas renders images as grids of sampled dots with extensive interactive distortion effects. The component samples source images at configurable cell sizes (default 3px), creating dot arrays with position, color, and drop state. Interactive mode tracks mouse position with smoothed follow (default 0.2 factor), applying distortion within configurable radius (80px). Three distortion modes exist: 'repel' pushes dots away, 'attract' pulls toward cursor, 'swirl' creates rotational flow. Distortion strength controls offset magnitude (default 3px). Dropout feature randomly removes low-contrast dots based on strength (0.4 default) for artistic effect. Additional features include grayscale conversion, tint color overlay with strength control, jitter animation (random motion near cursor), sample averaging for smoother colors, and FPS capping for performance. Shape options include circles or squares with configurable scale (0.9 default). Responsive mode adapts to container size. This creates retro pixel-art aesthetic with modern interactive distortion, ideal for artistic image displays, creative portfolios, or any context where stylized image rendering enhances visual appeal.
purpose: Render images as stylized pixel dot grids
behavior: Samples image at regular cell intervals
Tracks smoothed mouse position for interaction
Randomly drops dots based on contrast threshold
Supports tint overlay and grayscale conversion
visualCharacteristics: Grid of colored dots representing image
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
